column8: Maya Plisetskaya was born in Moscow in 1925. She is one of te world's___________ballerinas. (GREAT)
column9: Due to problems with her family in her early years, Maya________________by one of her aunts. (ADOPT)
column10: At the beginning of her training, Maya____________ballet under the tuition of Elizaveta Gerdt, a former ballerina of the Imperial School. (STUDY)
column11: By the age of 11, Maya______________on stage with the Bolshoi. She continued to perform until 1990, retiring at the age of 65. (APPEAR)
column12: Maya_______________famous outside Russia when she started touring abroad with the Bolshoi in 1959. (BECOME)
column13: During her travels, she_____________US President Jack Kennedy, who was born on exactly the same day as her. (MEET)
column14: Maya changed the world of ballet with her dancing. She remains to this day one of the great___________of the ballet stage. (BEAUTY)
column15: Maya is the wife of the Russian composer Rodion Shchedrin. They____________________since 1958. (MARRY)
column16: Ballet fans_______________Maya Plisetskaya any time in the near future. (NOT FORGET)
